message:
Propagate flowchart header direction to IR builder

Parse the graph/flowchart direction keyword (e.g. TD, LR) from the
header line and thread it through parse_flowchart_document into the
IR via builder.set_direction(). Previously the header direction was
silently discarded, so all flowcharts defaulted to the same layout
regardless of the declared direction.

Changes:
- Add header_direction field to FlowDocumentParseResult
- Thread a mutable Option<GraphDirection> through the recursive
  parse_flowchart_document_items calls
- Set direction on the IR builder when a header direction is found

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
